GenAiFunction.description: - Use this action to discover available fields on a Data Cloud object before querying it with QueryDataCloud. - Always call this first when you are unsure which fields exist on a Data Cloud object. Never guess field names. - Takes a Data Cloud object API name (e.g. ssot__Opportunity__dlm) and returns a JSON map of field names to their SQL type and position. - Use the returned field names exactly as-is when constructing queries with QueryDataCloud. - If the object does not exist, an error is returned with details.
